SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service

Interface UserService

All Known Implementing Classes:
UserServiceImpl
public interface UserService
Service interface for user profile business logic operations. Implementations of this interface provide methods for retrieving and managing user profiles, including OAuth2-based user identification.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<UserProfile>
    get(Long id)
    Returns the user profile with the specified ID, if it exists.
    List<UserProfile>
    getAll()
    Returns all user profiles.
    Optional<UserProfile>
    getByExternalId(UUID externalId)
    Finds a user profile by external identifier.
    UserProfile
    getCurrentUser()
    Returns the user profile associated with the current authenticated request.
    UserProfile
    getMe()
    Returns the user profile for the currently authenticated user, creating one if needed.
    UserProfile
    getOrCreate(String oauthKey, UserProfile userProfile)
    Returns the user profile for the specified OAuth2 key, creating a new profile if one does not already exist.
    UserProfile
    setEnabled(UUID externalId, boolean enabled)
    Sets enabled/disabled status for a user profile.
    UserProfile
    setManagerStatus(UUID externalId, boolean manager)
    Sets manager privilege for a user profile.
    UserProfile
    updateAvatar(Long id, URL avatar)
    Updates the avatar URL for the specified user profile.
    UserProfile
    updateDisplayName(Long id, String displayName)
    Updates the display name for the specified user profile.
    UserProfile
    updateEmail(Long id, String email)
    Updates the email address for the specified user profile.

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentUser

      UserProfile getCurrentUser()
      Returns the user profile associated with the current authenticated request. If the user does not already exist in the system, a new user profile will be created.
      Returns:
      User profile for the authenticated user.

    • get

      Optional<UserProfile> get(Long id)
      Returns the user profile with the specified ID, if it exists.
      Parameters:
      id - User profile ID.
      Returns:
      Optional containing the user profile if found, empty otherwise.

    • getOrCreate

      UserProfile getOrCreate(String oauthKey, UserProfile userProfile)
      Returns the user profile for the specified OAuth2 key, creating a new profile if one does not already exist.
      Parameters:
      oauthKey - OAuth2 key (typically the "sub" claim from the JWT).
      userProfile - Optional display name for new user profiles.
      Returns:
      User profile for the given OAuth2 key.

    • updateDisplayName

      UserProfile updateDisplayName(Long id, String displayName)
      Updates the display name for the specified user profile.
      Parameters:
      id - User profile ID.
      displayName - New display name.
      Returns:
      Updated user profile.

    • updateEmail

      UserProfile updateEmail(Long id, String email)
      Updates the email address for the specified user profile.
      Parameters:
      id - User profile ID.
      email - New email address.
      Returns:
      Updated user profile.

    • updateAvatar

      UserProfile updateAvatar(Long id, URL avatar)
      Updates the avatar URL for the specified user profile.
      Parameters:
      id - User profile ID.
      avatar - New avatar URL.
      Returns:
      Updated user profile.

    • getAll

      List<UserProfile> getAll()
      Returns all user profiles.
      Returns:
      list of user profiles.

    • getMe

      UserProfile getMe()
      Returns the user profile for the currently authenticated user, creating one if needed.
      Returns:
      current user's profile.

    • getByExternalId

      Optional<UserProfile> getByExternalId(UUID externalId)
      Finds a user profile by external identifier.
      Parameters:
      externalId - user external ID.
      Returns:
      optional containing the user profile if found.

    • setManagerStatus

      UserProfile setManagerStatus(UUID externalId, boolean manager)
      Sets manager privilege for a user profile.
      Parameters:
      externalId - user external ID.
      manager - true to grant manager privileges; false to revoke.
      Returns:
      updated user profile.

    • setEnabled

      UserProfile setEnabled(UUID externalId, boolean enabled)
      Sets enabled/disabled status for a user profile.
      Parameters:
      externalId - user external ID.
      enabled - true to enable; false to disable.
      Returns:
      updated user profile.
